title: Add automations for when item moves out of a group
excerpt: Currently all automatons based on groups are only for when an item moves into a particular group. It would be useful to be able to trigger off of a move out of 1 particular group.

posts.author: Dnfloyd (Danielle)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently all automatons based on groups are only for when an item moves into a particular group. It would be useful to be able to trigger off of a move out of 1 particular group.
